Then the checkout process is another haywire thing. We were not aware that you cannot bring 2 cars (nothing written in the terms and condition) . Review_Text: [SCAM ALERT!!!] Everything was fine until when we want to drive out from the car park. Review_Text: We booked the Executive 2-Bedroom. Apartment and had a wonderful stay. The unit came with two bedrooms and two bathrooms, with one bedroom having an attached bathroom. This was my first apartment-style stay experience, and it definitely exceeded my expectations. The apartment was located on the 33rd floor at Block A, and the check-in process was smooth. We collected our keys from the designated check-in counter, and although check-in and check-out were self-service, the staff were friendly and helpful whenever assistance was needed. One of the biggest advantages of this property is its location. TRX Mall is only about a 5-minute walk away. Within just a few minutes’ walk, there are plenty of food options including Chinese restaurants, mamak eateries, durian stalls, and even a McDonald’s nearby. Getting a Grab was also very easy and convenient. The apartment itself was very new, clean, and comfortable. The air-conditioning worked perfectly, and I especially liked that we could adjust the room temperature to our preference. The unit was well-equipped with kitchen utensils, including knives, scissors, and other essentials. There was also a washing machine available for guests who wish to do laundry. Netflix was provided in the living room, which was a nice bonus. There were no TVs in the bedrooms, but that wasn’t an issue for us. The only minor things to note are that facial tissues and laundry detergent were not provided, so it would be good to bring your own if needed. Overall, this was an excellent stay. The apartment was clean, comfortable, well-located, and great value for money. I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the TRX area.

Review_Text: STAY AWAY! It will ruin your holidays! We had an awful experience at Deface Platinum in Kuala Lumpur. When we first arrived, the check-in process took almost two hours! It was so frustrating, and when we finally got to our room, it was infested with bed bugs. We immediately informed the staff, but instead of helping us right away, they told us we’d have to wait until the next day for a room change. This is completely unacceptable, especially considering there were also ants all over the apartment. To make things worse, the hotel demanded a hefty 500 RM deposit, which they promised to return within 30 business days after the stay. That’s an incredibly long time to wait for a refund! On top of that, we were four people, yet they only gave us one key to the entire apartment. How is that even possible? The pool area was always overcrowded, and there are restricted times to access it, requiring you to have a key to get in. This place really needs to rethink their service and facilities. I would not recommend this hotel to anyone, as my experience was nothing short of a disaster.
